summary: Register adviceGenerated hook that adjusts routing confidence based on meta-KB anti-pattern matches and adds meta_kb_warnings/meta_kb_evidence counts to routing output
root_cause: OrchestrationAdvisor routing confidence was static and did not account for meta-KB anti-pattern evidence
fix_approach: Register built-in adviceGenerated hook in LearningEngine constructor that queries MetaKBReader and adjusts confidence by 0.9^warnings (floor 0.1), adds meta_kb_warnings and meta_kb_evidence routing fields

validation.notes: 4 new tests: confidence reduction, no-match unchanged, fail-open, positive evidence. All 22 meta-KB tests pass.
